mapper.sql: select id, system, work_month, work_week, work_week_end_date, employee, work_category, type, item, reporter, cost_department, planned_hours, actual_hours, create_time, update_time from work_hour
mapper.select: order by system, work_month, work_week, employee
mapper.insert: insert into work_hour( system, work_month, work_week, work_week_end_date, employee, work_category, type, item, reporter, cost_department, planned_hours, actual_hours, create_time, update_time )values( #{system}, #{workMonth}, #{workWeek}, #{workWeekEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employee}, #{workCategory}, #{type}, #{item}, #{reporter}, #{costDepartment}, #{plannedHours, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{actualHours, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, sysdate, sysdate )
mapper.delete:
delete from work_hour where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select a.cost_department as cost_department, sum(a.actual_hours) as total_actual_hours from work_hour a group by a.cost_department order by total_actual_hours desc
select a.system as system, sum(a.actual_hours) as total_actual_hours from work_hour a group by a.system order by total_actual_hours desc
select a.employee as employee, sum(a.actual_hours) as total_actual_hours from work_hour a group by a.employee order by total_actual_hours desc
select a.system as system, a.employee as employee, sum(a.actual_hours) as total_actual_hours from work_hour a group by a.system, a.employee order by a.system, total_actual_hours desc
select a.employee as employee, a.item as item, a.work_week_end_date as work_week_end_date from work_hour a where a.system = #{system} order by a.work_week_end_date asc
